title: Skeleton Loading Shimmer

statement.markdown:
## Skeleton Loading Shimmer Effect

Build an infinite shimmer layout overlaying mockup skeleton cards.

### Requirements:
1. **Linear Gradients**: Create linear gradient backgrounds scrolling continuously from left to right.
2. **Infinite Loops**: Shimmer animations loop infinitely without stuttering.
3. **Shimmer card layers**: Structure layout boxes mimicking image headers, titles, and text rows.

constraints: Do not use static flash animations

gradingCriteria.description: Verify shimmer scrolling linear movements translate continuously.
Verify skeleton layout shapes mock product cards cleanly.
